acct_complete_config_hint: Complete the configuration above first, then come back to connect.
acct_google_guide_step1: Go to Settings and enter your Google Client ID & Client Secret.
acct_google_guide_step2: Create credentials at Google Cloud Console → APIs & Services → Credentials.
acct_google_no_config_hint: Go to Settings to set up Google OAuth credentials first, then connect.
acct_hashnode_about: Hashnode uses Personal Access Token instead of OAuth
acct_tumblr_connect_hint: Click the button on the right to connect your Tumblr account via OAuth.
acct_tumblr_error_hint: Getting "redirect_uri_mismatch" error? Check that "Default callback URL" in your Tumblr app is exactly http://localhost:8000/accounts/tumblr/callback — no trailing /.
acct_tumblr_not_configured_desc: You need to enter the Consumer Key + Consumer Secret in Settings before connecting.
acct_tumblr_note: Tumblr uses OAuth 2.0. Consumer Key = Client ID, Consumer Secret = Client Secret — fill in both.
acct_wp_app_password_hint: Go to WP Admin → Users → Profile → Application Passwords → generate a new password
acct_wp_connect_hint: Click the button on the right to connect your WordPress.com account via OAuth.
acct_wp_guide_step3: Go to Settings and enter the Client ID and Client Secret.
acct_wp_guide_step4: Come back here and click "Connect WordPress.com".
acct_wpselfhosted_connect_title: Connect WordPress Self-hosted via Application Password
acct_wpselfhosted_empty_hint: Fill in the form above to connect your WordPress website.
acct_wpselfhosted_security_note: Application Passwords are sent via Basic Auth — use HTTPS on your site to keep credentials secure.
acct_wpselfhosted_step1: Log in to WP Admin → go to Users → Your Profile.
acct_wpselfhosted_step2: Scroll down to Application Passwords → enter a name → click Add New Application Password.
acct_wpselfhosted_step3: Copy the generated password (format: xxxx xxxx xxxx xxxx) — it's shown only once.
acct_wpselfhosted_step4: Paste the site URL, WordPress username and Application Password into the form above.
adm_health_ok: System running normally. No issues detected.
adm_ls_config_hint: for international customers paying with Visa/MasterCard
adm_ls_setup_hint: Sign up at lemonsqueezy.com → create a Store → create Products (Pro & Business) → get API Key + Variant IDs.
adm_ls_variant_hint: Found on the Product page in the LS dashboard
adm_ls_webhook_hint: Found at LemonSqueezy → Settings → Webhooks → Signing secret
adm_ls_webhook_url_hint: Paste this URL into LemonSqueezy → Settings → Webhooks → URL
adm_sepay_api_hint: Get it at sepay.vn → Dashboard → API. When configured, accounts are upgraded automatically upon receiving the correct transfer.
auth_register_agree: By registering, you agree to our
bill_auto_note_body: Your account will be upgraded as soon as the payment is detected (usually within minutes).
bill_intl_desc: Pay instantly with Visa, MasterCard, or PayPal — account upgraded automatically after payment.
bill_intl_not_configured: International payment is not configured yet. Please contact the admin.
bill_intl_powered_by: Secured by LemonSqueezy — Visa, MasterCard, PayPal accepted
bill_no_payment_config: Payment info not configured. Please contact admin.
bill_payment_after: After transfer, contact admin for activation. Account will be upgraded within 24 hours.
bill_payment_desc: Transfer to the bank account below and contact us to confirm:
bill_scan_qr: Scan QR with your banking app
bill_vn_desc: Domestic bank transfer — manually activated by admin within 24 hours.
blog_cta_desc: Try AutoBlogspot free for 3 days — no credit card needed.
blog_hero_desc: Tutorials, SEO tips, and practical knowledge on automating your blog with AI.
blog_page_desc: Detailed guides on auto blogging, auto-posting to WordPress, Blogspot, Tumblr, Hashnode. Practical SEO tips to grow organic traffic with AI.
blog_page_title: AutoBlogspot Blog — Guides & SEO Tips for Blog Automation
contact_message_placeholder: Describe your issue or question in detail...
contact_page_desc: Contact the AutoBlogspot team. We are ready to support you 24/7.
contact_subtitle: Have a question or need support? Fill in the form below — we will respond as soon as possible.
contact_success_body: Thank you for reaching out. We will reply as soon as possible.
fp_desc: Enter your registered email and we'll send you a password reset link.
fp_email_sent_desc: If that email exists in our system, you'll receive a reset link within a few minutes. Check your spam folder if you don't see it.
idx_empty: No indexing tasks yet. Articles will appear here automatically after publishing.
idx_process_1: After publish → URL auto-sent to Sinbyte.
idx_process_2: After 7 days: check if Google has indexed.
idx_process_3: Not indexed → resend to Sinbyte → check after 3 days.
idx_process_4: Still not → AI rewrites article → resubmit → check after 7 days. Repeat until indexed.
land_cta_body: Hundreds of SEO-optimized articles every month — auto-posted to Blogspot, WordPress.com, WordPress hosting, Tumblr, Hashnode. Images auto-generated, backlinks auto-inserted, Google indexing auto-submitted. Zero manual work.
land_cta_title: Let AI auto-write & publish to 5 platforms while you sleep
land_faq_a1: Yes. AutoBlogspot supports WordPress self-hosted via REST API and Application Passwords (available since WP 5.6+). Just enter your site URL, username and Application Password — no extra plugins needed.
land_faq_a2: Pro plan allows 10 websites, Business plan is unlimited. One project can post simultaneously to all selected websites — Blogspot, WordPress.com, self-hosted WordPress, Tumblr and Hashnode.
land_faq_a3: AutoBlogspot uses OpenRouter to access 50+ free AI models (Llama 3.1, Gemma, Mistral, DeepSeek...). Choose a model per project, the system auto-falls back when overloaded — AI costs are nearly zero.
land_faq_a4: After publishing, AutoBlogspot automatically submits URLs to Sinbyte for fast indexing. Typically Google crawls within 24–72 hours. Track each article's index status directly on the dashboard.
land_faq_a5: Yes. Each website in a project can be set to its own language. For example: Blogspot in Vietnamese, WordPress in English, Tumblr in Japanese — all from the same project.
land_faq_a6: Absolutely. AutoBlogspot automatically inserts affiliate backlinks contextually into content. Combined with 24/7 auto-posting to 5 platforms, it's the ideal solution for affiliate marketers looking to scale fast.
land_faq_q2: How many websites can I publish to simultaneously?
land_faq_q3: Which AI models are used? Are they free?
land_faq_q4: How long does it take for articles to be indexed by Google?
land_faq_q5: Can articles be written in multiple languages?
land_faq_q6: Is AutoBlogspot suitable for Affiliate Marketing?
land_faq_sub: Everything you need to know about AutoBlogspot
land_feat_accounts_desc: Connect as many Google/WordPress/Tumblr/Hashnode accounts as you like. Limit is only the number of websites per plan — accounts are unlimited.
land_feat_ai_desc: 50+ free AI models via OpenRouter (Llama 3.1, Gemma, Mistral, DeepSeek…). Writes keyword-targeted SEO articles naturally — auto-fallback when models are overloaded.
land_feat_backlink_desc: Set your target backlink list, AI inserts them contextually without being obvious — articles still read naturally even with links.
land_feat_cluster_desc: Input 500+ keywords, AI analyzes search intent and groups into logical clusters. Each cluster → one complete SEO article. Deploy large-scale keyword strategies in clicks.
land_feat_image_desc: Featured image: Pollinations.ai generates free AI images without API key. In-article images: Pixabay (royalty-free). Natural placement, auto alt text based on content.
land_feat_index_desc: Automatically checks each article's index status via Google search operator. Submits URL to Sinbyte for fast indexing right after publishing.
land_feat_multilang_desc: Write articles in Vietnamese, English, Korean, Japanese, Spanish and many other languages. Each site in a project can use its own language.
land_feat_retry_desc: API publishing failed? System auto-retries with exponential backoff. Detailed per-article logs, easy to debug. Scheduler keeps running even when a task fails.
land_feat_schedule_desc: Auto-post on schedule — set posts/day and min-max intervals. System randomizes posting times naturally to avoid bot detection, ensuring steady traffic growth.
land_features_sub: Every tool you need to build an automated, large-scale and efficient blog system.
land_footer_tagline: AI-powered software for automatic writing & publishing to 5 blog platforms. Runs 24/7, no supervision needed.
land_hero_lead: AutoBlogspot automatically analyzes keywords, writes SEO content and publishes to Blogspot, WordPress.com, WordPress self-hosted, Tumblr, Hashnode — no manual intervention needed.
land_hiw_sub: Just 4 steps to a fully automated system — from keywords to posts on 5 blog platforms.
land_meta_description: AutoBlogspot — AI software that automatically writes SEO-optimized content and publishes to 5 platforms (Blogspot, WordPress.com, WordPress hosting, Tumblr, Hashnode) simultaneously. Auto Google indexing. 3-day free trial.
land_pc_blogspot_desc: Secure Google OAuth connection. Sync all blogs in your account. Auto-publish with labels, images and backlinks.
land_pc_hashnode_desc: API key connection, auto-sync publications. Publish professional tech/blog articles with optimized SEO.
land_pc_tumblr_desc: Tumblr OAuth2 connection, auto-sync blog list. Post HTML content with tags and auto-refresh token.
land_pc_wordpress_desc: WordPress.com OAuth2 login. Manage multiple sites, publish with tags, excerpt and custom status.
land_pc_wpselfhosted_desc: Connect your own WordPress hosting via REST API + Application Passwords. No extra plugins — supported from WP 5.6+. Full control over your server.
land_platforms_sub: Write once, AI auto-distributes to Blogspot, WordPress.com, WordPress self-hosted, Tumblr and Hashnode simultaneously.
land_platforms_title: One project — publish to 5 blog platforms
land_pricing_note: All plans support 5 platforms: Blogspot, WordPress.com, WordPress self-hosted, Tumblr, Hashnode. Upgrade or downgrade anytime.
land_pricing_sub: 3-day free trial. Upgrade when you're ready to scale up.
land_step1_desc: Log in with Google, WordPress, Tumblr via OAuth2 or enter your Hashnode API key. System automatically syncs your blog/site list.
land_step2_desc: Select sites to post to, enter target keywords (supports 500+ keywords), choose AI model, set frequency and individual language per site.
land_step3_desc: AI clusters keywords → writes articles → inserts images → adds backlinks → posts to all platforms → submits URLs to Sinbyte for auto-indexing.
land_step3_title: Press Start — AI does the rest
land_step4_desc: Real-time dashboard: post count, Google index rate, keyword progress, detailed per-article logs and status on each platform.
land_title: AI software auto-writing & publishing to 5 blog platforms
land_uc1_desc: Automate writing and publishing to Blogspot, WordPress, Tumblr simultaneously. AI writes SEO content based on your keywords — no manual writing needed daily.
land_uc2_desc: Auto-post product reviews with affiliate backlinks to 5 platforms 24/7. Scale passive income without writing each article — AI handles everything.
land_uc3_desc: Manage dozens of websites, hundreds of keywords from one dashboard. AI clusters keywords, creates content, auto-indexes on Google — maximize organic traffic.
land_uc4_desc: Connect your own WordPress hosting via REST API, no extra plugins needed. Auto-post to your server just like Blogspot or WordPress.com — same workflow.
land_uc5_desc: Manage multiple clients, multiple domains from one account. Business plan with unlimited websites — ideal for SEO teams and content agencies at scale.
land_usecase_sub: From solo bloggers to SEO agencies — one auto-posting software for every need
land_why1_desc: AI is specially prompted to write in a natural human style, reducing the risk of Google detecting machine-generated content.
land_why2_desc: OpenRouter provides 50+ high-quality free AI models. AutoBlogspot automatically selects and falls back between models to ensure no interruption.
land_why3_desc: Sinbyte integration automatically submits URL immediately after publishing. Significantly speeds up Google crawl and index time, helping articles rank sooner.
land_why4_desc: Connect as many Google, WordPress, Tumblr, Hashnode accounts as you want. Distribute risk, increase organic traffic reach from multiple sources.
land_why5_desc: APScheduler runs continuously in the background, auto-retries on failure, auto-skips published articles. Just keep your computer on — AI handles everything else.
land_why5_title: Set up once — runs forever without supervision
land_why_sub: Not just auto-blog software — this is a complete SEO system that writes, publishes to 5 platforms and indexes Google 24/7.
projd_no_clusters: No clusters yet. Start the project to let AI cluster keywords.
projf_gemini_hint: Add a free Gemini API key for better quality articles
projf_kw_hint_many: Many — {lots} batches, will take extra processing time
projf_kw_hint_optimal: Optimal — AI clusters with highest quality
projf_kw_hint_very_many: Very many — {lots} batches, processing may take a while
projf_kw_later_hint: Add more keywords later on the project detail page
projf_labels_hint: Leave empty — AI will auto-generate labels
rp_done_desc: You can now sign in with your new password.
rp_err_too_short: Password must be at least 6 characters.
rp_subtitle: Create a new password for your account
rp_token_invalid_desc: The password reset link is invalid or has expired (30 minutes). Please request a new one.
sett_gemini_keys_note: (multiple keys = more quota, one key per line)
sett_oauth_note: Each account creates its own OAuth App
sett_pixabay_featured: Featured image: Always uses Pollinations.ai (AI-generated, no key needed)
sett_pixabay_inline: In-article images: Uses Pixabay if key is set
sett_sinbyte_hint_with: With key: post URLs auto-sent to Sinbyte for indexing.
